name: SendGrid

composio_registry_match.name: SendGrid
composio_registry_match.description: SendGrid is a cloud-based email delivery platform providing transactional and marketing email services, with APIs for integration, analytics, and scalability

description: Cloud-based email infrastructure platform providing transactional email APIs, SMTP relay, and marketing campaign management tools.
notes: Authentication is primarily via API Key (often referred to as 'Authorization: Bearer' tokens in their docs). Broad API surface is well-documented on the Twilio/SendGrid developer portal.
